test.name: Verify Team Performance Navigation

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Login App
Bypass SIT Environment If Needed
Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Return From Keyword If
kw.doc: Returns from the enclosing user keyword if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
DSS may show SIT/pre-login Webix buttons before the real login form.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
At Least One Login Control Visible
Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'webix_button') and contains(normalize-space(.),'Enter')]' not found.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'webix_button') and contains(normalize-space(.),'Enter')]' not found.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
True when username field or Enter CTA is already on screen.

kw.arg: At Least One Login Control Visible
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'webix_button') and contains(normalize-space(.),'Enter')]' not found.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[contains(@class,'webix_button') and contains(normalize-space(.),'Enter')]' not found.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[@type='button' and contains(@class, 'webix_button') and contains(translate(normalize-space(.), 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ', 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'), 'login') and contains(translate(normalize-space(.), 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ', 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'), 'password')]'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
Perform successful login with valid credentials.

kw.name: Main Page
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Ensure main page is loaded
